ddls:
CREATE TABLE "benchmark_jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmarking job */,
  "target" TEXT /* The target entity being benchmarked */,
  "target_namespace" TEXT /* Namespace of the target */,
  "target_type" TEXT /* Type of the target (e.g., Class, Method) */,
  "target_method" TEXT /* Method of the target to benchmark */,
  "job_platform" TEXT /* Platform on which the job runs (e.g., .NET Core 3.1) */,
  "job_runtime" TEXT /* Runtime environment for the job */,
  "job_build_configuration" TEXT /* Build configuration (e.g., Debug, Release) */,
  "job_arguments" TEXT /* Additional arguments for the benchmark job */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the job was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the job */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the job */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the job */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Description of the job for better context */,
  "job_status" TEXT /* Current status of the job (e.g., Pending, Running, Completed, Failed) */,
  "job_start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the job started */,
  "job_end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the job ended */,
  "job_duration" REAL /* Total duration of the job execution in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the benchmark job */,
  "measurement_launch_index" INTEGER /* Index of the benchmark launch */,
  "measurement_iteration_mode" TEXT /* Mode of iteration used in measurement */,
  "measurement_iteration_stage" TEXT /* Stage of the iteration during measurement */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Value measured during the benchmark */,
  "measurement_nanoseconds" REAL /* Time in nanoseconds taken for the measurement */,
  "measurement_operations" INTEGER /* Number of operations performed during the benchmark */,
  "job_outlier_mode" TEXT /* Outlier mode for the job results (e.g., Default) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the result was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the result */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Description of the result for better context */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., Success, Failed) */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage during the benchmark in bytes */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage during the benchmark as a percentage */,
  "io_operations" INTEGER /* Number of I/O operations performed during the benchmark */,
  "error_rate" REAL /* Error rate during the benchmark */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_results_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES benchmark_jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environment_variables" (
  "env_var_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment variable entry */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the benchmark job */,
  "var_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment variable */,
  "var_value" TEXT /* Value of the environment variable */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the environment variable was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the environment variable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment variable for better context */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_var_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environment_variables_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES benchmark_jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter entry */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the benchmark job */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the parameter was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter for better context */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_parameters_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES benchmark_jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job setting entry */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the benchmark job */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the setting was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting for better context */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_settings_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES benchmark_jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cpu_groups" (
  "cpu_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CPU group entry */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the benchmark job */,
  "cpu_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the CPU group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the CPU group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the CPU group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the CPU group for better context */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cpu_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cpu_groups_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES benchmark_jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_affinity" (
  "affinity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each affinity entry */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the benchmark job */,
  "affinity_mask" INTEGER /* Affinity mask for the job */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the affinity was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the affinity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the affinity for better context */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affinity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_affinity_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES benchmark_jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_logging" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the benchmark job */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message logged during job execution */,
  "log_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log (e.g., Info, Warning, Error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_logging_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES benchmark_jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the benchmark job */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date when the job was executed */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Total time taken for execution */,
  "execution_status" TEXT /* Status of the job execution (e.g., Success, Failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the history entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the history entry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the history entry for better context */,
  "execution_start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the job started executing */,
  "execution_end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the job finished executing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_history_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES benchmark_jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tool entry */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the benchmark job */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the benchmarking tool */,
  "tool_version" TEXT /* Version of the benchmarking tool */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tool was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the tool */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tool for better context */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_tools_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES benchmark_jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_parameters" (
  "job_param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job parameter entry */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the benchmark job */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the job parameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the job parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the parameter was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter for better context */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_parameters_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES benchmark_jobs ("job_id")
)
